name: R Bookdown Project
postCreateCommand: sudo apt-get update && sudo apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends cmake && sudo rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/* && R -e "install.packages(c('bookdown','janitor','skimr','DT','kableExtra','broom','here','Amelia','languageserver','httpgd','jsonlite','rlang'))"
